sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ttl (id UInt32, data String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id TTL created_at + INTERVAL 30 DAY;
INSERT INTO test_ttl (id, data, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Hello', now()), (2, 'World', now() - INTERVAL 40 DAY);
ALTER TABLE test_ttl MODIFY TTL created_at + INTERVAL 60 DAY;
